title: Stabbed in the Face: The Rise and Fall of the World's Most Violent Band
original_title: Stabbed in the Face: The Rise and Fall of the World's Most Violent Band
overview: An alternative documentary following the trail of blood and carnage of Philadelphia’s own Deathmatch Rock n’ Roll pioneers, Eat the Turnbuckle, from beer-soaked bars to the largest stage in the world of metal.
